description: women's sandals from catwalk for an understated edge. This versatile pair with its high-end styling matches your boho ethnic vibe. You can also wear this with form fitting denims to pull off a smart semi-formal ensemble. UpperSlip on style synthetic leather upper with stitch detailingStitch detailing for added style and durabilitySynthetic leather heel cup with cut outs on the sides for added structureElasticated band on the tongue for easy wearability Cushioned footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with upraised heelTextured design on forefoot  and heelshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
